ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "architecture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model architecture */,
  "dropout" REAL /* Dropout rate used in the model */,
  "lr" REAL /* Learning rate used during training */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node feature used */,
  "train_mse" REAL /* Mean squared error on the training dataset */,
  "test_mse" REAL /* Mean squared error on the testing dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of model creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES node_features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_architecture_id FOREIGN KEY ("architecture_id") REFERENCES architectures ("architecture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "architectures" (
  "architecture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each architecture */,
  "layers" INTEGER /* Number of layers in the architecture */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the architecture */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the architecture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of architecture creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("architecture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_architectures_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the node feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the node feature */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the node feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of node feature creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_features_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being trained */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the training session */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the training session (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the training session record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of training session record creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of user creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., accuracy, precision, recall) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of metric creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model configuration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration parameter (e.g., batch size, optimizer) */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of configuration creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_configurations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., owner, editor, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of collaboration creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_collaborations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of comment creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of version creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of tag creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_tags_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
